title: Spicy Norwegian Seed Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from North Africa, infused with the bold flavors of Norwegian seed and mildly peppery spices.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add sausage and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add tagine spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken broth, tomatoes, and Norwegian seed.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Garnish with parsley and serve over couscous.
